capabilities.name: Read simulated device status
capabilities.description: Reads synthetic battery and connection status from the simulated wearable.

capabilities.name: Read synthetic pulse signal
capabilities.description: Reads fictional pulse-like data for simulation only.

capabilities.name: Display simulated overlay
capabilities.description: Displays a non-invasive simulated AR overlay.

capabilities.name: Read overlay audit summary
capabilities.description: Reads a simulated summary of overlay decisions.

capabilities.name: Read simulated assist state
capabilities.description: Reads synthetic state from the assistive motion simulator.

capabilities.name: Request simulated motor assist
capabilities.description: Represents a simulated motor-assist request with no real hardware access.
